nasb.text: And while He was praying, the appearance of His face became different, and His clothing became white and gleaming.

esv.text: And as he was praying, the appearance of his face was altered, and his clothing became dazzling white.

cnv.text: 正禱告的時候，他的面貌就改變了，衣服潔白發光。

ccb.text: 耶稣在祷告的时候，容貌改变了，衣裳洁白发光。

csbs.text: 正在祷告的时候，耶稣的相貌改变了，衣服也洁白发光。
